item.title: Kim Jong Un chooses teen daughter as heir, says Seoul
item.description: South Korea's spy agency says Ki Ju Ae's prominent public presence indicates she is the chosen heir.

item.title: Polls close in first election since Gen Z protests ousted Bangladesh leader
item.description: Voters are hoping for a return to democracy after 15 years of authoritarian rule under Sheikh Hasina.

item.title: Russia orders block on WhatsApp in messaging app crackdown
item.description: WhatsApp says the move aims to push its 90 million users in Russia to a "state-owned surveillance app".

item.title: Police identify 18-year-old as suspect in Tumbler Ridge shooting
item.description: A candlelit vigil was held on Wednesday night in the remote British Columbia town where six people were killed and dozens injured.

item.title: 'One in a billion': Dawson's Creek stars lead tributes to James Van Der Beek
item.description: Katie Holmes pays tribute to her late co-star's "bravery, compassion, selflessness and strength".
